attributes.action: The government should not agree to pay illegal migrants to leave the UK
attributes.additional_details: Use the money for Policing  , NHS  Ambulance service, defense ( Army Navy ) Pot holes and much more needed in the UK than giving money to illegal immigrants who shouldn't even be here and have contributed nothing to our country
attributes.background: Not to pay illegal migrants any of UK tax payers money to leave the UK its preposterous and damaging to us UK citizens who work hard pay into the system and get nothing back.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
